wrong_finding.title: Orders pagination returns wrong data
wrong_finding.suggested_fix_direction: Add input validation for the cursor parameter.

why_wrong: Three errors. (1) Category 'input-validation' is wrong: the cursor format IS validated (ISO-8601 timestamp); the bug is in the SQL ordering, not the input parsing. Correct: 'cursor-drift'. (2) SEV-2 over-rates a recoverable inconsistency on infrequent paths; SEV-3 is the right tier per R-SEV3-01. (3) The fix direction is misleading — adding input validation does nothing for an order-by-non-unique-column problem; the fix is a composite cursor.
